title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: LIFEWAYS INC COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services may include case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services for transportation, in-home support or residential placement, and employment and vocational services. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Children and adults with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicants must be an Oregon resident and US citizen. Hours: Monday-Wednesday 8am-5pm, Thursday-Friday 8am-noon Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-9167 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application for Developmental Disabilities services. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who can help you through the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Malheur County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - PEER SUPPORT CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY SUPPORT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREASURE VALLEY REGION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWAYS INC
